The repeal of this section is based on a part of section 2 of House Resolution No. 1047, Ninety-fifth Congress, , which was enacted into permanent law by .Apr. 4, 1978Pub. L. 95–391

Effective Date of RepealSection 2 of House Resolution No. 1047, Ninety-fifth Congress, which was enacted into permanent law by , provided that the repeal is effective upon the enactment of House Resolution No. 1047 as permanent law, which was effected by , effective .Pub. L. 95–391Pub. L. 95–391, § 111Sept. 30, 1978

Ninety-fifth CongressSection 2 of House Resolution No. 1047, Ninety-fifth Congress, , enacted into permanent law by , provided that this section would not be effective in the Ninety-fifth Congress upon the adoption of H. Res. 1047.Apr. 4, 1978Pub. L. 95–391

Authorization for Payment of Expenses from Contingent Fund of House of Representatives for Participatory ActivitiesSection 1 of House Resolution No. 434, Ninety-fifth Congress, , enacted into permanent law by , , , which provided that, until otherwise provided by law, there was to have been paid out of the contingent fund of the House of Representatives such sums as may have been necessary, but not to exceed $15,000 in any calendar year, for the payment of expenses incurred in carrying out this section, was repealed by section 2 of H. Res. 1047, Ninety-fifth Congress, , which was enacted into permanent law by , effective .Mar. 31, 1977Aug. 5, 1977Apr. 4, 1978Sept. 30, 1978Pub.
